inflation.label: Inflation (CPI)
inflation.description: Primary RBA mandate. CPI YoY % change is the most direct measure of price stability.

wages.label: Wages (WPI)
wages.description: Key input to inflation expectations. Sustained wage growth above productivity signals inflationary pressure.

employment.label: Employment
employment.description: RBA dual mandate: full employment. Tight labour markets signal demand-pull inflation.

housing.label: Housing
housing.description: Financial stability concern. Rising prices increase household leverage and wealth effects on spending.

spending.label: Household Spending
spending.description: Consumer demand pressure. Strong household spending growth signals demand-driven inflation.

building_approvals.label: Building Approvals
building_approvals.description: Leading indicator for construction activity and housing supply. Noisy but directionally useful.

business_confidence.label: Business Confidence
business_confidence.description: NAB capacity utilisation. High utilisation signals inflation pressure from limited spare capacity.

asx_futures.label: ASX Futures
asx_futures.description: Market-implied rate expectations. Displayed as benchmark, excluded from hawk score calculation.
